question: Considering the area chart of earnings over years, which statement is best supported by the visualization?

options.A: Earnings reached a visible local peak in 2019 before dropping in 2020.
options.B: It is clear from the chart that 2022 had the lowest earnings of all the years shown.
options.C: The exact earnings value for 2022 cannot be read because the top of the area for that year is clipped by the chart boundary.
options.D: Earnings in 2019 and 2022 appear to be the same because both years reach the top of the chart.

explanation: The scale is set so that the highest bars exceed the visible area, leading to a misleading impression of equality.
